privacy_title: Privacy Policy for RVDiA Digital Assistant
privacy_content:
Last updated: May 10th, 2026

Welcome to the privacy policy for RVDiA, a free-to-use and open-source Digital Assistant. This policy outlines how RVDiA collects, uses, and protects user information. By using RVDiA, you agree to the practices described in this policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please refrain from using the assistant.

1. Information Collection and Use:

RVDiA does not collect any personal information from users. The assistant does not have access to any data related to user identities, messages, or interactions on servers. RVDiA is designed to perform specific functions within servers and does not track or store any user-related data.

2. Server Data:

RVDiA may process and store data related to server configurations, settings, and other non-personal information necessary for its proper functioning. However, this data is not used to identify individual users or collect personal information.

3. Data Sharing:

As RVDiA does not collect personal information, there is no data sharing with third parties. Any server data processed by RVDiA is solely for the purpose of providing the intended functionality within the servers where the assistant is invited.

4. Security:

The developers of RVDiA take data security seriously and implement reasonable measures to protect the assistant and any server data it processes. However, it is important to note that no method of data transmission or storage over the internet is 100% secure. Users should be aware of potential risks when using any online service, including RVDiA.

5. Children's Privacy:

RVDiA is not intended for use by individuals under the age of 13. The assistant does not knowingly collect any personal information from children. If you are a parent or guardian and believe that your child has used RVDiA and provided personal information, please contact us immediately at schryzon@gmail.com, and we will take appropriate steps to remove any such information from our records.

6. Modifications to the Privacy Policy:

The developer of RVDiA may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes to the policy will be posted on the platform. It is your responsibility to review this policy periodically to stay informed of any updates.

7. Contact Information:

If you have any questions or concerns regarding this privacy policy or the privacy practices of RVDiA, you can contact the developer at schryzon@gmail.com.

By using RVDiA, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to this privacy policy. Thank you for using RVDiA, and we hope you find it helpful for your servers!
terms_title: Terms of Service for RVDiA Digital Assistant
terms_content:
Last updated: May 10th, 2026

Welcome to RVDiA (Revolutionary Virtual Digital Assistant)! Thank you for using my free-to-use and open-source Digital Assistant. Before using RVDiA, please carefully read and agree to the following Terms of Service (TOS).

By using RVDiA, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please refrain from using the assistant.

Usage and Ownership:

RVDiA is an open-source assistant, and its source code is available publicly on GitHub. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the assistant according to the terms of the open-source GNU AGPL version 3 license.

Prohibited Activities:

You agree not to use RVDiA for any unlawful, abusive, harassing, threatening, or harmful purposes. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:

  • Violating Discord's Terms of Service or Community Guidelines.
  • Impersonating other users, individuals, or entities.
  • Spamming, advertising, or promoting illegal or inappropriate content.
  • Attempting to compromise the security or stability of the assistant or its hosting environment.

Support and Maintenance:

RVDiA is provided on an 'as-is' basis without any warranties or guarantees of support or maintenance. The developers may update or modify the assistant at their discretion, but they are not obligated to do so. They are not liable for any loss of data or functionality resulting from updates or maintenance.

Liability:

The developers of RVDiA shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages arising from the use or inability to use the assistant, including but not limited to damages for loss of profits, goodwill, data, or other intangible losses.

Indemnification:

By using RVDiA, you agree to indemnify and hold harmless the developers from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses arising from your use or misuse of the assistant, violation of the TOS, or infringement of any third-party rights.

Privacy:

RVDiA does not collect or store any personal information. However, it is your responsibility to review and comply with Discord's Privacy Policy when using the assistant in conjunction with Discord.

Changes to the Terms of Service:

The developer may update these Terms of Service from time to time without prior notice. Any changes will be effective immediately upon posting the revised TOS. It is your responsibility to review the TOS periodically, and continued use of RVDiA after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

Termination:

The developer reserves the right to terminate or suspend your access to RVDiA at any time for any reason, including but not limited to violation of these Terms of Service.

Governing Law:

These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Indonesia, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

Contact:

If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms of Service or the RVDiA assistant, you can reach out to the developers at schryzon@gmail.com.

By using RVDiA, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Service. Thank you for using RVDiA, and I hope you enjoy the assistant!
